description: Clean cross-print Phantump mirror. CSE-93 is the trivia-anchored canonical entry (miki kudo art, lonely-spirit register, child-spirit-possessed-tree-stump lore); RBC-014 is the second corpus print (sui art, teal-aura eerie register), extending species coverage into the Sword & Shield era. Same Generation VI Kalos Ghost/Grass species, National Pokedex no. 708, same possessed-tree-stump origin canon. The CSE-side Connections section already carries the wave-26 E1 Phantump → Trevenant evolution edge — the new cross-print bullet extends that section rather than creating a parallel one. The RBC card had no prior Connections section; clean creation. Standard mirror, no fanfare.
